content.Placements: The placement at this college is too bad and I have seen none of the students get placed anywhere after finishing the degrees. Though internships are available for students, there is zero to no placement. Almost all the students get an internship in different companies like banks and other industries.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is honestly very poor, there's no Wi-Fi available, the labs don't have tools available, the library lacks quality books and space to sit and read, and the classrooms are filthy, filled with dust, that are rarely or not cleaned at all. Sports are held but only some popular games are focused on.
